summaryPatterns: I'm a Senior Frontend Developer with 6+ years of experience building high-load B2B/B2C products. Delivered 7 client applications from scratch, optimized performance reducing loading time by 40%, and led frontend teams of 3-6 developers.

I'm a Frontend Developer with 5+ years developing enterprise-grade React applications. Migrated legacy systems serving 1M+ daily users, reduced bundle size by 30%, and implemented testing coverage increasing from 15% to 85%.

I'm a Lead Frontend Developer with 7+ years experience in fintech and e-commerce. Built scalable architectures for 50K+ weekly orders, increased conversion by 18% through performance optimization, and mentored 5+ junior developers.

I'm a Senior Frontend Engineer with 6+ years creating complex SPA applications. Developed systems handling 10K+ virtual machines, implemented micro-frontends for 5+ product teams, and reduced development time by 42% through automation tools.
achievementPhrases: Reduced application loading time by 40% through code splitting and optimization
Increased test coverage from 15% to 85% implementing comprehensive testing strategy
Migrated legacy system serving 1M+ daily users with zero downtime
Reduced bundle size by 30% through webpack optimization and lazy loading
Built high-load platform handling 50K+ orders per week
Increased conversion rate by 18% through performance optimization
Reduced development time by 42% creating internal CLI tools
Improved organic traffic growth by 15% through SEO optimization
Decreased false positive rate to <2% implementing real-time object detection
Optimized page loading reducing time from minutes to 5 seconds
Handled 10K+ virtual machines in enterprise infrastructure platform
Managed frontend team of 6+ developers in cross-functional Scrum environment
Reduced runtime errors by migrating 100K+ LOC from JavaScript to TypeScript
Achieved 94% recognition accuracy in computer vision implementation
Supported 300+ business users in DICOM viewer application
Processed 200+ servers in maintenance scheduling system
Increased user retention by 12% through cart synchronization features
Reduced infrastructure costs by implementing micro-frontend architecture for 5+ teams
keyResponsibilities: Develop and maintain complex React/TypeScript applications
Design and implement scalable frontend architectures
Optimize application performance and bundle size
Integrate with REST APIs and WebSocket connections
Implement comprehensive testing strategies (unit, integration, e2e)
Conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers
Collaborate with cross-functional teams in Agile environment
Migrate legacy systems to modern tech stacks
Create and maintain UI component libraries and design systems
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and accessibility compliance
redFlags: Перечисление более 40+ технологий без контекста использования
Отсутствие конкретных цифр и метрик в достижениях
Указание только Junior-уровневых задач при опыте 5+ лет
Использование устаревших технологий как основных (jQuery, AngularJS)
Отсутствие опыта работы с TypeScript при позиции Senior+
notes: Frontend React разработчики в России фокусируются на создании высоконагруженных B2B/B2C приложений. Ключевые тренды: обязательный TypeScript для Middle+ позиций, активное использование современного React (hooks, функциональные компоненты), внедрение архитектурных подходов (FSD, микрофронтенды). Важны навыки оптимизации производительности, работы с состоянием (Redux Toolkit, Zustand), тестирования и DevOps практик. Сильные кандидаты демонстрируют опыт миграции legacy-систем, создания UI-библиотек, менторства команды. Популярные домены: финтех, e-commerce, телеком. Обязательно указание конкретных метрик достижений (проценты оптимизации, объемы данных, размеры команд). Знание английского B2+ становится стандартом.
